---
title: ""
---

::: {#home .hero}

<video id="hero-video" class="hero-video" autoplay muted loop playsinline
       poster="favicon.svg" preload="metadata"
       aria-hidden="true"></video>

::: {.hero-overlay}
:::

::: {.hero-content}

::: {.hero-copy}
::: {.hero-badge .fade-in-up .delay-1}
[]{.status-dot} Based in Spain — building data products that run
:::

# Progress <span class="accent">in</span> Motion {.hero-title .fade-in-up .delay-2}

[Software Developer & Data Analyst — trained at **42 Madrid**. I turn raw data into pipelines, dashboards, and forecasts that ship.]{.hero-subtitle .fade-in-up .delay-3}

::: {.hero-actions .fade-in-up .delay-4}
[See my work](#work){.btn .btn-primary .glow-btn}
[Let's talk](#contact){.btn .btn-secondary .glass-btn}
:::
:::

<div class="terminal fade-in-up delay-4" id="terminal" aria-label="Interactive terminal — try the command 'help'">
<div class="term-titlebar">
<span class="term-dots" aria-hidden="true"><i></i><i></i><i></i></span>
<span class="term-title">maximo@42madrid: ~/portfolio</span>
<span class="term-shell">zsh</span>
</div>
<div class="term-body" id="term-body">
<div class="term-output" id="term-output" aria-live="polite"></div>
<div class="term-line">
<span class="term-prompt" aria-hidden="true"><span class="tp-user">maximo@42</span><span class="tp-sep">:</span><span class="tp-path">~/portfolio</span>&nbsp;<span class="tp-char">%</span></span>
<span class="term-field">
<span class="term-mirror" aria-hidden="true"><span id="term-typed"></span><span class="term-cursor" id="term-cursor"></span><span class="term-ghost" id="term-ghost"></span></span>
<input type="text" id="term-input" class="term-input" autocomplete="off" autocapitalize="none" autocorrect="off" spellcheck="false" enterkeyhint="go" aria-label="Terminal input. Type help and press Enter.">
</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="term-hints" id="term-hints">
<span class="term-hints-label">try:</span>
<button type="button" class="term-hint" data-cmd="help">help</button>
<button type="button" class="term-hint" data-cmd="skills">skills</button>
<button type="button" class="term-hint" data-cmd="42madrid">42madrid</button>
<button type="button" class="term-hint" data-cmd="projects">projects</button>
</div>
</div>

:::

<a href="#about" class="scroll-cue" aria-label="Scroll to about section"><span>scroll</span><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"/></svg></a>

:::

::: {.marquee aria-hidden="true"}
::: {.marquee-track}
[C ✦ Python ✦ SQL ✦ Shell ✦ Git ✦ Pandas ✦ Streamlit ✦ Tableau ✦ Power BI ✦ Docker ✦ Plotly ✦ 42 Madrid]{.marquee-chunk}
[C ✦ Python ✦ SQL ✦ Shell ✦ Git ✦ Pandas ✦ Streamlit ✦ Tableau ✦ Power BI ✦ Docker ✦ Plotly ✦ 42 Madrid]{.marquee-chunk}
:::
:::

::: {#about}

::: {.section-header}
::: {.section-badge .fade-up}
about me
:::

## Who I <span class="serif-accent">Am</span> {.section-title .fade-up .stagger-1}
:::

::: {.about-intro}

::: {.glass-panel .profile-card .float-bob .fade-in}

::: {.profile-img-container}
::: {.profile-initials}
MW
:::
:::

## Maximo Williner {.profile-name}

::: {.title-badge}
Software Developer · Data Analyst
:::

::: {.card-stats}
::: {.stat}
[42 Madrid]{.stat-val .gradient-text}
[Piscine ✓ · Core]{.stat-label}
:::
::: {.stat}
[100% Code]{.stat-val .gradient-text}
[C · Python · SQL]{.stat-label}
:::
:::

::: {.specialties}
[C]{.badge} [Python]{.badge} [SQL]{.badge} [Marketing]{.badge}
:::

:::

::: {.glass-panel .text-card .fade-up}
Software Developer & Data Analyst trained at **42 Madrid**. I combine low-level programming rigor — C, shell, Unix — with a marketing brain: funnels, KPIs, and consumer metrics. The result: raw, messy data turned into scrapers, pipelines, and dashboards that answer real business questions.

Peer-to-peer pedagogy taught me to read docs, debug in public, and ship code that survives review. Marketing taught me which questions are worth answering.
:::

:::

::: {.about-grid}

::: {.glass-panel .stats-card .fade-in}
::: {.stat-grid}

::: {.stat-box}
::: {.neon-icon}
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><polyline points="16 18 22 12 16 6"/><polyline points="8 6 2 12 8 18"/></svg>
:::

[C · Python · SQL]{.stat-val .gradient-text}

[Core stack — 42 Madrid]{.stat-label}
:::

::: {.stat-box}
::: {.neon-icon}
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><line x1="18" y1="20" x2="18" y2="10"/><line x1="12" y1="20" x2="12" y2="4"/><line x1="6" y1="20" x2="6" y2="14"/></svg>
:::

[Tableau · Power BI]{.stat-val .gradient-text}

[BI delivery]{.stat-label}
:::

::: {.stat-box}
::: {.neon-icon}
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><polyline points="23 4 23 10 17 10"/><polyline points="1 20 1 14 7 14"/><path d="M3.51 9a9 9 0 0 1 14.85-3.36L23 10M1 14l4.64 4.36A9 9 0 0 0 20.49 15"/></svg>
:::

[Pipelines · ETL]{.stat-val .gradient-text}

[Automation mindset]{.stat-label}
:::

:::
:::

:::

## What I <span class="serif-accent">Work</span> With {.section-title .fade-up}

::: {.skills-container}

::: {.skill-category .fade-up}
### Core · 42 Madrid {.skill-label}

::: {.skill-chips}
[C]{.chip} [Shell]{.chip} [Unix]{.chip} [Git]{.chip} [Algorithms]{.chip} [Make]{.chip}
:::
:::

::: {.skill-category .fade-up}
### Data & Analytics {.skill-label}

::: {.skill-chips}
[Python]{.chip} [SQL]{.chip} [Pandas]{.chip} [PostgreSQL]{.chip} [Streamlit]{.chip} [DuckDB]{.chip}
:::
:::

::: {.skill-category .fade-up}
### Visualization & BI {.skill-label}

::: {.skill-chips}
[Tableau]{.chip} [Power BI]{.chip} [Plotly]{.chip} [Seaborn]{.chip} [Looker]{.chip}
:::
:::

::: {.skill-category .fade-up}
### Marketing & Methods {.skill-label}

::: {.skill-chips}
[Market research]{.chip} [Funnels]{.chip} [Cohort analysis]{.chip} [A/B testing]{.chip} [Attribution]{.chip} [Forecasting]{.chip}
:::
:::

:::

:::

::: {#work}

::: {.section-header}
::: {.section-badge .fade-up}
selected work
:::

## <span class="serif-accent">Projects</span> {.section-title .fade-up .stagger-1}
:::

<div class="pipeline-card glass-panel fade-up" id="pipeline-card">
<div class="pipeline-head">
<div class="pipeline-head-text">
<h3 class="pipeline-title">From raw to <span class="serif-accent">revenue</span></h3>
<p class="pipeline-sub">Click a stage to inspect its live output — or run the whole flow.</p>
</div>
<button class="pipeline-run" id="pipeline-run" type="button">
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="6 3 20 12 6 21 6 3"/></svg>
<span>Run pipeline</span>
</button>
</div>

<div class="pipeline" id="pipeline" role="group" aria-label="Data pipeline stages">
<button class="pipe-node" data-step="extract" type="button" aria-pressed="false">
<span class="pipe-icon" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="7 10 12 15 17 10"/><line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="3"/></svg></span>
<span class="pipe-text"><span class="pipe-label">Extract</span><span class="pipe-sub">scrapers · APIs</span></span>
</button>
<span class="pipe-link" aria-hidden="true"></span>
<button class="pipe-node" data-step="transform" type="button" aria-pressed="false">
<span class="pipe-icon" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="4" y1="21" x2="4" y2="14"/><line x1="4" y1="10" x2="4" y2="3"/><line x1="12" y1="21" x2="12" y2="12"/><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="3"/><line x1="20" y1="21" x2="20" y2="16"/><line x1="20" y1="12" x2="20" y2="3"/><line x1="1" y1="14" x2="7" y2="14"/><line x1="9" y1="8" x2="15" y2="8"/><line x1="17" y1="16" x2="23" y2="16"/></svg></span>
<span class="pipe-text"><span class="pipe-label">Transform</span><span class="pipe-sub">pandas · dbt</span></span>
</button>
<span class="pipe-link" aria-hidden="true"></span>
<button class="pipe-node" data-step="load" type="button" aria-pressed="false">
<span class="pipe-icon" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><ellipse cx="12" cy="5" rx="9" ry="3"/><path d="M21 12c0 1.66-4 3-9 3s-9-1.34-9-3"/><path d="M3 5v14c0 1.66 4 3 9 3s9-1.34 9-3V5"/></svg></span>
<span class="pipe-text"><span class="pipe-label">Load</span><span class="pipe-sub">SQL · warehouse</span></span>
</button>
<span class="pipe-link" aria-hidden="true"></span>
<button class="pipe-node" data-step="visualize" type="button" aria-pressed="false">
<span class="pipe-icon" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="18" y1="20" x2="18" y2="10"/><line x1="12" y1="20" x2="12" y2="4"/><line x1="6" y1="20" x2="6" y2="14"/></svg></span>
<span class="pipe-text"><span class="pipe-label">Visualize</span><span class="pipe-sub">BI · dashboards</span></span>
</button>
</div>

<div class="pipe-console">
<div class="pipe-console-bar">
<span class="pc-dots" aria-hidden="true"><i></i><i></i><i></i></span>
<span class="pc-file" id="pipe-file">extract_jobs.py</span>
<span class="pc-status" id="pipe-status">idle</span>
</div>
<pre class="pipe-output" aria-live="polite"><code id="pipe-code"></code></pre>
</div>
</div>

::: {.projects-grid .fade-in}

::: {.project-card .glass-panel}
::: {.project-visual}
::: {.mock-browser .v1}
<div class="browser-dots"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>
::: {.mock-content}
<div class="mini-chart chart-bars" aria-hidden="true"><span style="--h:38%"></span><span style="--h:56%"></span><span style="--h:46%"></span><span style="--h:68%"></span><span style="--h:60%"></span><span style="--h:84%"></span><span style="--h:74%"></span></div>
:::
:::
:::
::: {.project-info}
### Job Market Scraper & Analytics {.accent}

Automated web scraper aggregating job listings across platforms into a SQL database with Streamlit analytics.

::: {.tech-stack}
[Python]{.chip} [Scraping]{.chip} [SQL]{.chip} [Streamlit]{.chip}
:::

<a class="project-link" href="https://github.com/maxiwilliner" aria-label="Job Market Scraper on GitHub">GitHub <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><line x1="7" y1="17" x2="17" y2="7"/><polyline points="7 7 17 7 17 17"/></svg></a>
:::
:::

::: {.project-card .glass-panel}
::: {.project-visual}
::: {.mock-browser .v2}
<div class="browser-dots"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>
::: {.mock-content}
<div class="mini-chart chart-line" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 200 100" fill="none" aria-hidden="true"><polyline points="5,80 35,66 62,73 92,48 122,56 152,28 195,14" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><circle cx="195" cy="14" r="4"/></svg></div>
:::
:::
:::
::: {.project-info}
### Unit Economics & Cohort Analyzer {.accent}

Python toolkit for customer lifetime value, retention cohorts, and marketing channel attribution.

::: {.tech-stack}
[Python]{.chip} [Pandas]{.chip} [Cohorts]{.chip} [Marketing]{.chip}
:::

<a class="project-link" href="https://github.com/maxiwilliner" aria-label="Unit Economics Analyzer on GitHub">GitHub <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><line x1="7" y1="17" x2="17" y2="7"/><polyline points="7 7 17 7 17 17"/></svg></a>
:::
:::

::: {.project-card .glass-panel}
::: {.project-visual}
::: {.mock-browser .v3}
<div class="browser-dots"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>
::: {.mock-content}
<div class="mini-chart chart-forecast" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 200 100" fill="none" aria-hidden="true"><path class="hist" d="M5 72 C 28 58, 45 80, 70 62 S 108 42, 128 54" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/><path class="proj" d="M128 54 C 148 64, 168 30, 195 38" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></div>
:::
:::
:::
::: {.project-info}
### Algorithms & System Tooling {.accent}

Low-level algorithms and Unix system utilities built in C at 42 Madrid — memory allocators, data structures, shell tools.

::: {.tech-stack}
[C]{.chip} [Unix]{.chip} [Algorithms]{.chip} [42 Madrid]{.chip}
:::

<a class="project-link" href="https://github.com/maxiwilliner" aria-label="Algorithms & System Tooling on GitHub">GitHub <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><line x1="7" y1="17" x2="17" y2="7"/><polyline points="7 7 17 7 17 17"/></svg></a>
:::
:::

:::

:::

::: {#experience}

::: {.section-header}
::: {.section-badge .fade-up}
track record
:::

## The <span class="serif-accent">Journey</span> {.section-title .fade-up .stagger-1}
:::

::: {.case-studies-list .fade-in}

::: {.case-study-card .glass-panel}
[]{.tl-dot}

::: {.cs-meta}
[42 Madrid]{.cs-tag} [Common Core]{.cs-tag} [Ongoing]{.cs-date}
:::

::: {.cs-content}
### Software Developer — 42 Madrid {.accent}

Intensive peer-to-peer software engineering program. Building the Common Core from scratch in C: reimplementing libc (`libft`), `ft_printf`, memory-safe data structures and Unix tooling. No frameworks, no shortcuts — every function defended in peer code reviews.

::: {.cs-outcomes}
::: {.cs-stat}
[100%]{.cs-stat-val}
[code-based]{.cs-stat-label}
:::
::: {.cs-stat}
[C · Unix · Git]{.cs-stat-val .cs-stat-text}
[daily drivers]{.cs-stat-label}
:::
::: {.cs-stat}
[P2P]{.cs-stat-val}
[reviewed code]{.cs-stat-label}
:::
:::

::: {.cs-stack}
[C]{.chip} [Unix]{.chip} [Shell]{.chip} [Git]{.chip} [Algorithms]{.chip}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.case-study-card .glass-panel}
[]{.tl-dot}

::: {.cs-meta}
[42 Madrid]{.cs-tag} [Selection Bootcamp]{.cs-tag} [Piscine — passed]{.cs-date}
:::

::: {.cs-content}
### Piscine — 42 Madrid {.accent}

26 days of total immersion in C and shell: daily rush projects, weekly exams, and collaborative debugging with strangers. Survived the Piscine and earned a seat in the Common Core.

::: {.cs-outcomes}
::: {.cs-stat}
[26]{.cs-stat-val data-count="26"}
[days immersed]{.cs-stat-label}
:::
::: {.cs-stat}
[100%]{.cs-stat-val}
[C & shell]{.cs-stat-label}
:::
::: {.cs-stat}
[✓]{.cs-stat-val}
[seat earned]{.cs-stat-label}
:::
:::

::: {.cs-stack}
[C]{.chip} [Bash]{.chip} [Vim]{.chip} [Git]{.chip}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.case-study-card .glass-panel}
[]{.tl-dot}

::: {.cs-meta}
[Marketing]{.cs-tag} [GS Vocational]{.cs-tag} [TFG pending]{.cs-date}
:::

::: {.cs-content}
### Marketing & Commercial Management {.accent}

Higher vocational degree (GS) — the business lens behind the data work. Market research, consumer metrics, and funnels: where I learned which questions are worth answering with data.

::: {.cs-outcomes}
::: {.cs-stat}
[Funnels]{.cs-stat-val .cs-stat-text}
[& KPIs]{.cs-stat-label}
:::
::: {.cs-stat}
[Market]{.cs-stat-val .cs-stat-text}
[research]{.cs-stat-label}
:::
::: {.cs-stat}
[Consumer]{.cs-stat-val .cs-stat-text}
[metrics]{.cs-stat-label}
:::
:::

::: {.cs-stack}
[Market research]{.chip} [Funnels]{.chip} [A/B testing]{.chip} [Attribution]{.chip}
:::
:::
:::

:::

:::

::: {#contact .site-footer}

::: {.footer-top .glass-panel .fade-in}

::: {.contact-info}

## Got a <span class="serif-accent">project?</span> {.contact-title}

[Let's talk.]{.contact-lede}

Open to junior Software Developer / Data Analyst roles and freelance data projects. Based in Spain, working globally.

:::

::: {.btn-row}
[Email me](mailto:maximowilliner35@gmail.com){.btn .btn-primary .glow-btn}
<button class="btn btn-secondary glass-btn copy-email" type="button" data-email="maximowilliner35@gmail.com">Copy email</button>
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/maximo-williner-12155a292/){.btn .btn-secondary .glass-btn}
[GitHub](https://github.com/maxiwilliner){.btn .btn-secondary .glass-btn}
:::

:::

::: {.footer-bottom}
[Maximo Williner]{.brand}
[Built with Quarto — (c) 2026]{.copyright}
:::

:::
